characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Young adult, fair complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and reddish-brown hair styled in a neat updo. She has a smooth, stylized appearance typical of modern 3D animation.
characters.wardrobe: A light green turtleneck sweater and small gold stud earrings.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and expressive, with animated facial movements.

characters.appearance: Real human female. Young adult, fair complexion, long dark brown hair, and dark eyes. She has a natural, unstyled look.
characters.wardrobe: A dark, possibly black or navy, turtleneck sweater.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, slightly hesitant when speaking, and focused on the interaction.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Yes, a little. I am hunger. [Yes, a little. I am hunger.]
Character A says: No, no. We say: I am hungry. English में आप 'hunger' नहीं होते, आप 'hungry' होते हैं। [No, no. We say: I am hungry. In English you are not 'hunger', you are 'hungry'.]
Character B says: I am hungry. [I am hungry.]
Character A says: What do you want to eat? [What do you want to eat?]
Character B says: I want a pizza margherita. [I want a pizza margherita.]
Character A says: Good! And to drink? [Good! And to drink?]
Character B says: I want one water. [I want one water.]
Character A says: Better to say: I would like some water, please. ज़्यादा polite लगता है। [Better to say: I would like some water, please. Sounds more polite.]
Character B says: I would like some water, please. [I would like some water, please.]
Character A says: Perfect! देखा, आपकी English improve हो रही है। [Perfect! See, your English is improving.]
Character B says: Thank you. पर आप कौन हैं? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर आपकी AI tutor हूँ। हम रोज़ ऐसे ही practice करेंगे और आप confidently English बोलने लगेंगे। [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We will practice like this every day and you will start speaking English confidently.]
Character B says: Ok, मैं Supernova अभी try करती हूँ। [Ok, I will try Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core product value: an interactive AI tutor correcting mistakes in real-time.
- Demonstrates the conversational, practical nature of the learning.
- Transitions smoothly into the brand reveal and CTA.
